message:
build: Bundle native resources for production sidecar

Copy pi-coding-agent/package.json and ripgrep binary from
node_modules during server postbuild. Bundle both as Tauri
resources and pass PI_PACKAGE_DIR and RG_PATH env vars to the
sidecar. Gitignore the copied artifacts.

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/l2i7fpohi3nx7ly20z4shzn2

files.patch:
@@ -26,3 +26,7 @@ tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
 
 # Rust
 /target/
+
+# Copied from node_modules during server postbuild
+src-tauri/pi-agent/
+src-tauri/binaries/rg
